mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL004 */ A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, A.BB_PRODUCT_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, A.BB_GESTURE_VALUE, A.BB_PRICE_FROM, A.BB_PRICE_TO, A.BB_PRICE_CUT, A.BB_DISCOUNT_FROM, A.BB_DISCOUNT_TO, A.BB_DISCOUNT_CUT, A.BB_STRIKE_PRICE, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, A.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, A.BB_STOCK, A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN, A.BB_URGENT_STOP, B.PRESENTATION_DATE, NVL(C.MAX_ALLOCATION_UNITS,10) AS MAX_ALLOCATION_UNITS, DECODE(A.BB_UNIT_KBN, '1', '株', '2', '円', '3', '口', '株') AS BB_UNIT_KBN, B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AS IFA_BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO AS IFA_BB_PRESENTATION_TO, B.EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') =B.PRESENTATION_FROM LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.BB_MAX_ALLOCATION_QUANTITY C ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = C.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') =C.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{brandCode} AND TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(NVL(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM), 'yyyyMMddhh24mi') AND NVL(TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_TO, 'yyyyMMddhh24mi'),'999912312359') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ETRADE.STO_BOSYU_MASTER@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD SBM WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = SBM.SBM_PRODUCT_CODE AND SBM.SBM_SYOHIN_TYPE = '21' )

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL006_#SQL007_#SQL008 */ NVL(A.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO,10) - NVL(A.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) - NVL(G.OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS MAYBE_SAIRYOU_COUNT, NVL(A.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, NVL(G.OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, G.OLD_BRANCH_NO, G.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO, NVL(A.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO,10) AS MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER A ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(A.BRANCH_NO,1,3) AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(A.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(A.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END LEFT JOIN ( SELECT E.BUTEN_CODE AS BUTEN_CODE, E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER, NVL(F.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, E.OLD_BRANCH_NO, E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM ( SELECT C.BUTEN_CODE, C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, D.OLD_BRANCH_NO, D.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO C INNER JOIN CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT D ON C.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(D.NEW_BRANCH_NO,1,3) AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(D.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) WHERE C.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) ) E LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER F ON E.OLD_BRANCH_NO = F.BRANCH_NO AND TO_NUMBER(E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO) = TO_NUMBER(F.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(F.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) G ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = G.BUTEN_CODE AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = G.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL009_#SQL010 */ COUNT(*) FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A INNER JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND B.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(B.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{accountNumber}, 7, 0)) WHERE A.BB_LOT = '0' AND A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1'
AND A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE <> #{brandCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL003 */ C.SECTION_ID, C.SECTION_NAME FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO A LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO B ON B.BROKER_CODE = A.BROKER_CODE AND B.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE = A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF C ON A.BROKER_CODE = C.BROKER_CODE AND B.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = C.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-03_1#SQL014 */ A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, DECODE(A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(A.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'),'') AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE FROM T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT A WHERE A.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber})
